old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.44.7.1.5","title":"Simplify DAO send lifecycle and freshness","description":"Remove manual confirm_dao/pending-only semantics with K=0 explicit. Each logical send allocates an update, while failed radio TX retains safe retry bytes. Make authenticated 64-bit origin sequence authoritative for signed route/path freshness so lollipop loss cannot strand updates; retain raw component lollipop checks.","acceptance_criteria":"Twenty lost sends followed by delivery applies at root; replay remains rejected; TX failure safely retries exact reserved bytes once or equivalent fail-closed behavior; no manual confirm API remains.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-07-20T06:06:49.594412766Z","created_by":"ec2-user","updated_at":"2026-07-20T06:06:49.594412766Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.44.7.1.5","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.44.7.1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-20T06:06:49.681166044Z","created_by":"ec2-user","metadata":"{}"}]}

new_value: Removed manual confirm/retransmit APIs; send_dao now auto-clears successful K=0 updates and retains exact failed bytes. Authenticated 64-bit origin sequence now governs signed freshness while raw lollipop checks remain. Added 20-loss regression; full lichen-rpl and RplStack tests pass.
